validate.notes: All validation checks passed. Fixed solve.sh script - the original git apply patch didn't work because the base file format (especially unit.rs line 119-120 split pattern) differed from what the patch expected. Replaced with Python-based patching that correctly handles: 1) WellKnownFunctionKind::RequireFrom variant in analyzer/mod.rs, 2) URL pattern matching and handler in references/mod.rs, 3) Uncommenting 6 test cases in unit.rs with special handling for the split-line format.

p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 2 pass_to_pass tests from repo CI/CD:

tests_added.description: Validates no new unused turbo-tasks items are introduced. Base commit has 2 known unused items (size_bytes in turbopack-browser and turbopack-core) which are accepted as baseline.
Validates node-file-trace test fixtures exist for create-require tests
